Notes: I do not think that this case is Indian law because it does not involve any tribal parties or have any implications for tribes going forward. This case involves a land claim for land that was purchased from the Biloxi Indians with the consent of the French government, and is being adjudicated by the purchasers’ heirs. However, I still selected land because of the holding that a purchase from the Indians, whilst the province was under French authority, conveyed no title unless sanctioned by that authority. - ZW
